verses.kjv: And a knop under two branches of the same, and a knop under two branches of the same, and a knop under two branches of the same, according to the six branches going out of it.
verses.bsb: A bud was under the first pair of branches that extended from the lampstand, a bud under the second pair, and a bud under the third pair.

verses.kjv: Their knops and their branches were of the same: all of it was one beaten work of pure gold.
verses.bsb: The buds and branches were all of one piece with the lampstand, hammered out of pure gold.

verses.kjv: And he made his seven lamps, and his snuffers, and his snuffdishes, of pure gold.
verses.bsb: He also made its seven lamps, its wick trimmers, and trays of pure gold.

verses.kjv: Of a talent of pure gold made he it, and all the vessels thereof.
verses.bsb: He made the lampstand and all its utensils from a talent of pure gold.

verses.kjv: ¶ And he made the incense altar of shittim wood: the length of it was a cubit, and the breadth of it a cubit; it was foursquare; and two cubits was the height of it; the horns thereof were of the same.
verses.bsb: He made the altar of incense out of acacia wood. It was square, a cubit long, a cubit wide, and two cubits high. Its horns were of one piece.

verses.kjv: And he overlaid it with pure gold, both the top of it, and the sides thereof round about, and the horns of it: also he made unto it a crown of gold round about.
verses.bsb: And he overlaid with pure gold the top and all the sides and horns. Then he made a molding of gold around it.

verses.kjv: And he made two rings of gold for it under the crown thereof, by the two corners of it, upon the two sides thereof, to be places for the staves to bear it withal.
verses.bsb: He made two gold rings below the molding on opposite sides to hold the poles used to carry it.

verses.kjv: And he made the staves of shittim wood, and overlaid them with gold.
verses.bsb: And he made the poles of acacia wood and overlaid them with gold.

verses.kjv: ¶ And he made the holy anointing oil, and the pure incense of sweet spices, according to the work of the apothecary.
verses.bsb: He also made the sacred anointing oil and the pure, fragrant incense, the work of a perfumer.

verses.kjv: AND he made the altar of burnt offering of shittim wood: five cubits was the length thereof, and five cubits the breadth thereof; it was foursquare; and three cubits the height thereof.
verses.bsb: Bezalel constructed the altar of burnt offering from acacia wood. It was square, five cubits long, five cubits wide, and three cubits high.

verses.kjv: And he made the horns thereof on the four corners of it; the horns thereof were of the same: and he overlaid it with brass.
verses.bsb: He made a horn at each of its four corners, so that the horns and altar were of one piece, and he overlaid the altar with bronze.

verses.kjv: And he made all the vessels of the altar, the pots, and the shovels, and the basons, and the fleshhooks, and the firepans: all the vessels thereof made he of brass.
verses.bsb: He made all the altar’s utensils of bronze—its pots, shovels, sprinkling bowls, meat forks, and firepans.

verses.kjv: And he made for the altar a brasen grate of network under the compass thereof beneath unto the midst of it.
verses.bsb: He made a grate of bronze mesh for the altar under its ledge, halfway up from the bottom.

verses.kjv: And he cast four rings for the four ends of the grate of brass, to be places for the staves.
verses.bsb: At the four corners of the bronze grate he cast four rings as holders for the poles.

verses.kjv: And he made the staves of shittim wood, and overlaid them with brass.
verses.bsb: And he made the poles of acacia wood and overlaid them with bronze.

verses.kjv: And he put the staves into the rings on the sides of the altar, to bear it withal; he made the altar hollow with boards.
verses.bsb: Then he inserted the poles into the rings on the sides of the altar for carrying it. He made the altar with boards so that it was hollow.

verses.kjv: ¶ And he made the laver of brass, and the foot of it of brass, of the lookingglasses of the women assembling, which assembled at the door of the tabernacle of the congregation.
verses.bsb: Next he made the bronze basin and its stand from the mirrors of the women who served at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting.

verses.kjv: ¶ And he made the court: on the south side southward the hangings of the court were of fine twined linen, an hundred cubits:
verses.bsb: Then he constructed the courtyard. The south side of the courtyard was a hundred cubits long and had curtains of finely spun linen,

verses.kjv: Their pillars were twenty, and their brasen sockets twenty; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets were of silver.
verses.bsb: with twenty posts and twenty bronze bases, and with silver hooks and bands on the posts.

verses.kjv: And for the north side the hangings were an hundred cubits, their pillars were twenty, and their sockets of brass twenty; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets of silver.
verses.bsb: The north side was also a hundred cubits long, with twenty posts and twenty bronze bases. The hooks and bands of the posts were silver.

verses.kjv: And for the west side were hangings of fifty cubits, their pillars ten, and their sockets ten; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets of silver.
verses.bsb: The west side was fifty cubits long and had curtains, with ten posts and ten bases. The hooks and bands of the posts were silver.

verses.kjv: And for the east side eastward fifty cubits.
verses.bsb: And the east side, toward the sunrise, was also fifty cubits long.

verses.kjv: The hangings of the one side of the gate were fifteen cubits; their pillars three, and their sockets three.
verses.bsb: The curtains on one side of the entrance were fifteen cubits long, with three posts and three bases.

verses.kjv: And for the other side of the court gate, on this hand and that hand, were hangings of fifteen cubits; their pillars three, and their sockets three.
verses.bsb: And the curtains on the other side were also fifteen cubits long, with three posts and three bases as well.

verses.kjv: All the hangings of the court round about were of fine twined linen.
verses.bsb: All the curtains around the courtyard were made of finely spun linen.

verses.kjv: And the sockets for the pillars were of brass; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets of silver; and the overlaying of their chapiters of silver; and all the pillars of the court were filleted with silver.
verses.bsb: The bases for the posts were bronze, the hooks and bands were silver, and the plating for the tops of the posts was silver. So all the posts of the courtyard were banded with silver.

verses.kjv: And the hanging for the gate of the court was needlework, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen: and twenty cubits was the length, and the height in the breadth was five cubits, answerable to the hangings of the court.
verses.bsb: The curtain for the entrance to the courtyard was embroidered with blue, purple, and scarlet yarn, and finely spun linen. It was twenty cubits long and, like the curtains of the courtyard, five cubits high,

verses.kjv: And their pillars were four, and their sockets of brass four; their hooks of silver, and the overlaying of their chapiters and their fillets of silver.
verses.bsb: with four posts and four bronze bases. Their hooks were silver, as well as the bands and the plating of their tops.

verses.kjv: And all the pins of the tabernacle, and of the court round about, were of brass.
verses.bsb: All the tent pegs for the tabernacle and for the surrounding courtyard were bronze.

verses.kjv: ¶ This is the sum of the tabernacle, even of the tabernacle of testimony, as it was counted, according to the commandment of Moses, for the service of the Levites, by the hand of Ithamar, son to Aaron the priest.
verses.bsb: This is the inventory for the tabernacle, the tabernacle of the Testimony, as recorded at Moses’ command by the Levites under the direction of Ithamar son of Aaron the priest.

verses.kjv: And Bezaleel the son of Uri, the son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah, made all that the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: Bezalel son of Uri, the son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah, made everything that the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.kjv: And with him was Aholiab, son of Ahisamach, of the tribe of Dan, an engraver, and a cunning workman, and an embroiderer in blue, and in purple, and in scarlet, and fine linen.
verses.bsb: With him was Oholiab son of Ahisamach, of the tribe of Dan, an engraver, designer, and embroiderer in blue, purple, and scarlet yarn and fine linen.

verses.kjv: All the gold that was occupied for the work in all the work of the holy place, even the gold of the offering, was twenty and nine talents, and seven hundred and thirty shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary.
verses.bsb: All the gold from the wave offering used for the work on the sanctuary totaled 29 talents and 730 shekels, according to the sanctuary shekel.

verses.kjv: And the silver of them that were numbered of the congregation was an hundred talents, and a thousand seven hundred and threescore and fifteen shekels, after the shekel of the sanctuary:
verses.bsb: The silver from those numbered among the congregation totaled 100 talents and 1,775 shekels, according to the sanctuary shekel—

verses.kjv: A bekah for every man, that is, half a shekel, after the shekel of the sanctuary, for every one that went to be numbered, from twenty years old and upward, for six hundred thousand and three thousand and five hundred and fifty men.
verses.bsb: a beka per person, that is, half a shekel, according to the sanctuary shekel, from everyone twenty years of age or older who had crossed over to be numbered, a total of 603,550 men.

verses.kjv: And of the hundred talents of silver were cast the sockets of the sanctuary, and the sockets of the vail; an hundred sockets of the hundred talents, a talent for a socket.
verses.bsb: The hundred talents of silver were used to cast the bases of the sanctuary and the bases of the veil—100 bases from the 100 talents, one talent per base.

verses.kjv: And of the thousand seven hundred seventy and five shekels he made hooks for the pillars, and overlaid their chapiters, and filleted them.
verses.bsb: With the 1,775 shekels of silver he made the hooks for the posts, overlaid their tops, and supplied bands for them.

verses.kjv: And the brass of the offering was seventy talents, and two thousand and four hundred shekels.
verses.bsb: The bronze from the wave offering totaled 70 talents and 2,400 shekels.

verses.kjv: And therewith he made the sockets to the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, and the brasen altar, and the brasen grate for it, and all the vessels of the altar,
verses.bsb: He used it to make the bases for the entrance to the Tent of Meeting, the bronze altar and its bronze grating, all the utensils for the altar,

verses.kjv: And the sockets of the court round about, and the sockets of the court gate, and all the pins of the tabernacle, and all the pins of the court round about.
verses.bsb: the bases for the surrounding courtyard and its gate, and all the tent pegs for the tabernacle and its surrounding courtyard.

verses.kjv: AND of the blue, and purple, and scarlet, they made cloths of service, to do service in the holy place, and made the holy garments for Aaron; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: From the blue, purple, and scarlet yarn they made specially woven garments for ministry in the sanctuary, as well as the holy garments for Aaron, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.kjv: And he made the ephod of gold, blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen.
verses.bsb: Bezalel made the ephod of finely spun linen embroidered with gold, and with blue, purple, and scarlet yarn.

verses.kjv: And they did beat the gold into thin plates, and cut it into wires, to work it in the blue, and in the purple, and in the scarlet, and in the fine linen, with cunning work.
verses.bsb: They hammered out thin sheets of gold and cut threads from them to interweave with the blue, purple, and scarlet yarn, and fine linen—the work of a skilled craftsman.

verses.kjv: They made shoulderpieces for it, to couple it together: by the two edges was it coupled together.
verses.bsb: They made shoulder pieces for the ephod, which were attached at two of its corners, so it could be fastened.

verses.kjv: And the curious girdle of his ephod, that was upon it, was of the same, according to the work thereof; of gold, blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: And the skillfully woven waistband of the ephod was of one piece with the ephod, of the same workmanship—with gold, with blue, purple, and scarlet yarn, and with finely spun linen, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.kjv: ¶ And they wrought onyx stones inclosed in ouches of gold, graven, as signets are graven, with the names of the children of Israel.
verses.bsb: They mounted the onyx stones in gold filigree settings, engraved like a seal with the names of the sons of Israel.

verses.kjv: And he put them on the shoulders of the ephod, that they should be stones for a memorial to the children of Israel; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: Then they fastened them on the shoulder pieces of the ephod as memorial stones for the sons of Israel, as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.kjv: ¶ And he made the breastplate of cunning work, like the work of the ephod; of gold, blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen.
verses.bsb: He made the breastpiece with the same workmanship as the ephod, with gold, with blue, purple, and scarlet yarn, and with finely spun linen.

verses.kjv: It was foursquare; they made the breastplate double: a span was the length thereof, and a span the breadth thereof, being doubled.
verses.bsb: It was square when folded over double, a span long and a span wide.

verses.kjv: And they set in it four rows of stones: the first row was a sardius, a topaz, and a carbuncle: this was the first row.
verses.bsb: And they mounted on it four rows of gemstones:  The first row had a ruby, a topaz, and an emerald;

verses.kjv: And the second row, an emerald, a sapphire, and a diamond.
verses.bsb: the second row had a turquoise, a sapphire, and a diamond;

verses.kjv: And the third row, a ligure, an agate, and an amethyst.
verses.bsb: the third row had a jacinth, an agate, and an amethyst;

verses.kjv: And the fourth row, a beryl, an onyx, and a jasper: they were inclosed in ouches of gold in their inclosings.
verses.bsb: and the fourth row had a beryl, an onyx, and a jasper.   These stones were mounted in gold filigree settings.

verses.kjv: And the stones were according to the names of the children of Israel, twelve, according to their names, like the engravings of a signet, every one with his name, according to the twelve tribes.
verses.bsb: The twelve stones corresponded to the names of the sons of Israel. Each stone was engraved like a seal with the name of one of the twelve tribes.

verses.kjv: And they made upon the breastplate chains at the ends, of wreathen work of pure gold.
verses.bsb: For the breastpiece they made braided chains like cords of pure gold.

verses.kjv: And they made two ouches of gold, and two gold rings; and put the two rings in the two ends of the breastplate.
verses.bsb: They also made two gold filigree settings and two gold rings, and fastened the two rings to the two corners of the breastpiece.

verses.kjv: And they put the two wreathen chains of gold in the two rings on the ends of the breastplate.
verses.bsb: Then they fastened the two gold chains to the two gold rings at the corners of the breastpiece,

verses.kjv: And the two ends of the two wreathen chains they fastened in the two ouches, and put them on the shoulderpieces of the ephod, before it.
verses.bsb: and they fastened the other ends of the two chains to the two filigree settings, attaching them to the shoulder pieces of the ephod at the front.

verses.kjv: And they made two rings of gold, and put them on the two ends of the breastplate, upon the border of it, which was on the side of the ephod inward.
verses.bsb: They made two more gold rings and attached them to the other two corners of the breastpiece, on the inside edge next to the ephod.

verses.kjv: And they made two other golden rings, and put them on the two sides of the ephod underneath, toward the forepart of it, over against the other coupling thereof, above the curious girdle of the ephod.
verses.bsb: They made two additional gold rings and attached them to the bottom of the two shoulder pieces of the ephod, on its front, near the seam just above its woven waistband.

verses.kjv: And they did bind the breastplate by his rings unto the rings of the ephod with a lace of blue, that it might be above the curious girdle of the ephod, and that the breastplate might not be loosed from the ephod; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: Then they tied the rings of the breastpiece to the rings of the ephod with a cord of blue yarn, so that the breastpiece was above the waistband of the ephod and would not swing out from the ephod, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.kjv: ¶ And he made the robe of the ephod of woven work, all of blue.
verses.bsb: They made the robe of the ephod entirely of blue cloth, the work of a weaver,

verses.kjv: And there was an hole in the midst of the robe, as the hole of an habergeon, with a band round about the hole, that it should not rend.
verses.bsb: with an opening in the center of the robe like that of a garment, with a collar around the opening so that it would not tear.

verses.kjv: And they made upon the hems of the robe pomegranates of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and twined linen.
verses.bsb: They made pomegranates of blue, purple, and scarlet yarn and finely spun linen on the lower hem of the robe.

verses.kjv: And they made bells of pure gold, and put the bells between the pomegranates upon the hem of the robe, round about between the pomegranates;
verses.bsb: They also made bells of pure gold and attached them around the hem between the pomegranates,

verses.kjv: A bell and a pomegranate, a bell and a pomegranate, round about the hem of the robe to minister in; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: alternating the bells and pomegranates around the lower hem of the robe to be worn for ministry, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.kjv: ¶ And they made coats of fine linen of woven work for Aaron, and for his sons,
verses.bsb: For Aaron and his sons they made tunics of fine linen, the work of a weaver,

verses.kjv: And a mitre of fine linen, and goodly bonnets of fine linen, and linen breeches of fine twined linen,
verses.bsb: as well as the turban of fine linen, the ornate headbands and undergarments of finely spun linen,

verses.kjv: And a girdle of fine twined linen, and blue, and purple, and scarlet, of needlework; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: and the sash of finely spun linen, embroidered with blue, purple, and scarlet yarn, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.kjv: ¶ And they made the plate of the holy crown of pure gold, and wrote upon it a writing, like to the engravings of a signet, HOLINESS TO THE LORD.
verses.bsb: They also made the plate of the holy crown of pure gold, and they engraved on it, like an inscription on a seal:  HOLY TO THE LORD.

verses.kjv: And they tied unto it a lace of blue, to fasten it on high upon the mitre; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: Then they fastened to it a blue cord to mount it on the turban, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.kjv: ¶ Thus was all the work of the tabernacle of the tent of the congregation finished: and the children of Israel did according to all that the Lord commanded Moses, so did they.
verses.bsb: So all the work for the tabernacle, the Tent of Meeting, was completed. The Israelites did everything just as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.kjv: ¶ And they brought the tabernacle unto Moses, the tent, and all his furniture, his taches, his boards, his bars, and his pillars, and his sockets,
verses.bsb: Then they brought the tabernacle to Moses:  the tent with all its furnishings, its clasps, its frames, its crossbars, and its posts and bases;

verses.kjv: And the covering of rams’ skins dyed red, and the covering of badgers’ skins, and the vail of the covering,
verses.bsb: the covering of ram skins dyed red, the covering of fine leather, and the veil of the covering;

verses.kjv: The ark of the testimony, and the staves thereof, and the mercy seat,
verses.bsb: the ark of the Testimony with its poles and the mercy seat;

verses.kjv: The table, and all the vessels thereof, and the shewbread,
verses.bsb: the table with all its utensils and the Bread of the Presence;

verses.kjv: The pure candlestick, with the lamps thereof, even with the lamps to be set in order, and all the vessels thereof, and the oil for light,
verses.bsb: the pure gold lampstand with its row of lamps and all its utensils, as well as the oil for the light;

verses.kjv: And the golden altar, and the anointing oil, and the sweet incense, and the hanging for the tabernacle door,
verses.bsb: the gold altar, the anointing oil, the fragrant incense, and the curtain for the entrance to the tent;

verses.kjv: The brasen altar, and his grate of brass, his staves, and all his vessels, the laver and his foot,
verses.bsb: the bronze altar with its bronze grating, its poles, and all its utensils;   the basin with its stand;

verses.kjv: The hangings of the court, his pillars, and his sockets, and the hanging for the court gate, his cords, and his pins, and all the vessels of the service of the tabernacle, for the tent of the congregation,
verses.bsb: the curtains of the courtyard with its posts and bases;   the curtain for the gate of the courtyard, its ropes and tent pegs, and all the equipment for the service of the tabernacle, the Tent of Meeting;

verses.kjv: The cloths of service to do service in the holy place, and the holy garments for Aaron the priest, and his sons’ garments, to minister in the priest’s office.
verses.bsb: and the woven garments for ministering in the sanctuary, both the holy garments for Aaron the priest and the garments for his sons to serve as priests.

verses.kjv: According to all that the Lord commanded Moses, so the children of Israel made all the work.
verses.bsb: The Israelites had done all the work just as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.kjv: And Moses did look upon all the work, and, behold, they had done it as the Lord had commanded, even so had they done it: and Moses blessed them.
verses.bsb: And Moses inspected all the work and saw that they had accomplished it just as the LORD had commanded. So Moses blessed them.

verses.kjv: AND the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,
verses.bsb: Then the LORD said to Moses,

verses.kjv: On the first day of the first month shalt thou set up the tabernacle of the tent of the congregation.
verses.bsb: “On the first day of the first month you are to set up the tabernacle, the Tent of Meeting.

verses.kjv: And thou shalt put therein the ark of the testimony, and cover the ark with the vail.
verses.bsb: Put the ark of the Testimony in it and screen off the ark with the veil.

verses.kjv: And thou shalt bring in the table, and set in order the things that are to be set in order upon it; and thou shalt bring in the candlestick, and light the lamps thereof.
verses.bsb: Then bring in the table and set out its arrangement; bring in the lampstand as well, and set up its lamps.

verses.kjv: And thou shalt set the altar of gold for the incense before the ark of the testimony, and put the hanging of the door to the tabernacle.
verses.bsb: Place the gold altar of incense in front of the ark of the Testimony, and hang the curtain at the entrance to the tabernacle.

verses.kjv: And thou shalt set the altar of the burnt offering before the door of the tabernacle of the tent of the congregation.
verses.bsb: Place the altar of burnt offering in front of the entrance to the tabernacle, the Tent of Meeting.

verses.kjv: And thou shalt set the laver between the tent of the congregation and the altar, and shalt put water therein.
verses.bsb: And place the basin between the Tent of Meeting and the altar, and put water in it.

verses.kjv: And thou shalt set up the court round about, and hang up the hanging at the court gate.
verses.bsb: Set up the surrounding courtyard and hang the curtain for the entrance to the courtyard.

verses.kjv: And thou shalt take the anointing oil, and anoint the tabernacle, and all that is therein, and shalt hallow it, and all the vessels thereof: and it shall be holy.
verses.bsb: Take the anointing oil and anoint the tabernacle and everything in it; consecrate it along with all its furnishings, and it shall be holy.

verses.kjv: And thou shalt anoint the altar of the burnt offering, and all his vessels, and sanctify the altar: and it shall be an altar most holy.
verses.bsb: Anoint the altar of burnt offering and all its utensils; consecrate the altar, and it shall be most holy.

verses.kjv: And thou shalt anoint the laver and his foot, and sanctify it.
verses.bsb: Anoint the basin and its stand and consecrate them.

verses.kjv: And thou shalt bring Aaron and his sons unto the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, and wash them with water.
verses.bsb: Then bring Aaron and his sons to the entrance to the Tent of Meeting and wash them with water.

verses.kjv: And thou shalt put upon Aaron the holy garments, and anoint him, and sanctify him; that he may minister unto me in the priest’s office.
verses.bsb: And you are to clothe Aaron with the holy garments, anoint him, and consecrate him, so that he may serve Me as a priest.

verses.kjv: And thou shalt bring his sons, and clothe them with coats:
verses.bsb: Bring his sons forward and clothe them with tunics.

verses.kjv: And thou shalt anoint them, as thou didst anoint their father, that they may minister unto me in the priest’s office: for their anointing shall surely be an everlasting priesthood throughout their generations.
verses.bsb: Anoint them just as you anointed their father, so that they may also serve Me as priests. Their anointing will qualify them for a permanent priesthood throughout their generations.”

verses.kjv: Thus did Moses: according to all that the Lord commanded him, so did he.
verses.bsb: Moses did everything just as the LORD had commanded him.

verses.kjv: ¶ And it came to pass in the first month in the second year, on the first day of the month, that the tabernacle was reared up.
verses.bsb: So the tabernacle was set up on the first day of the first month of the second year.

verses.kjv: And Moses reared up the tabernacle, and fastened his sockets, and set up the boards thereof, and put in the bars thereof, and reared up his pillars.
verses.bsb: When Moses set up the tabernacle, he laid its bases, positioned its frames, inserted its crossbars, and set up its posts.

verses.kjv: And he spread abroad the tent over the tabernacle, and put the covering of the tent above upon it; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: Then he spread the tent over the tabernacle and put the covering over the tent, just as the LORD had commanded him.

verses.kjv: ¶ And he took and put the testimony into the ark, and set the staves on the ark, and put the mercy seat above upon the ark:
verses.bsb: Moses took the Testimony and placed it in the ark, attaching the poles to the ark; and he set the mercy seat atop the ark.

verses.kjv: And he brought the ark into the tabernacle, and set up the vail of the covering, and covered the ark of the testimony; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: Then he brought the ark into the tabernacle, put up the veil for the screen, and shielded off the ark of the Testimony, just as the LORD had commanded him.

verses.kjv: ¶ And he put the table in the tent of the congregation, upon the side of the tabernacle northward, without the vail.
verses.bsb: Moses placed the table in the Tent of Meeting on the north side of the tabernacle, outside the veil.

verses.kjv: And he set the bread in order upon it before the Lord; as the Lord had commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: He arranged the bread on it before the LORD, just as the LORD had commanded him.

verses.kjv: ¶ And he put the candlestick in the tent of the congregation, over against the table, on the side of the tabernacle southward.
verses.bsb: He also placed the lampstand in the Tent of Meeting opposite the table on the south side of the tabernacle

verses.kjv: And he lighted the lamps before the Lord; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: and set up the lamps before the LORD, just as the LORD had commanded him.

verses.kjv: ¶ And he put the golden altar in the tent of the congregation before the vail:
verses.bsb: Moses placed the gold altar in the Tent of Meeting, in front of the veil,

verses.kjv: And he burnt sweet incense thereon; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: and he burned fragrant incense on it, just as the LORD had commanded him.

verses.kjv: ¶ And he set up the hanging at the door of the tabernacle.
verses.bsb: Then he put up the curtain at the entrance to the tabernacle.

verses.kjv: And he put the altar of burnt offering by the door of the tabernacle of the tent of the congregation, and offered upon it the burnt offering and the meat offering; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: He placed the altar of burnt offering near the entrance to the tabernacle, the Tent of Meeting, and offered on it the burnt offering and the grain offering, just as the LORD had commanded him.

verses.kjv: ¶ And he set the laver between the tent of the congregation and the altar, and put water there, to wash withal.
verses.bsb: He placed the basin between the Tent of Meeting and the altar and put water in it for washing;

verses.kjv: And Moses and Aaron and his sons washed their hands and their feet thereat:
verses.bsb: and from it Moses, Aaron, and his sons washed their hands and feet.

verses.kjv: When they went into the tent of the congregation, and when they came near unto the altar, they washed; as the Lord commanded Moses.
verses.bsb: They washed whenever they entered the Tent of Meeting or approached the altar, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.

verses.kjv: And he reared up the court round about the tabernacle and the altar, and set up the hanging of the court gate. So Moses finished the work.
verses.bsb: And Moses set up the courtyard around the tabernacle and the altar, and he hung the curtain for the entrance to the courtyard. So Moses finished the work.

verses.kjv: ¶ Then a cloud covered the tent of the congregation, and the glory of the Lord filled the tabernacle.
verses.bsb: Then the cloud covered the Tent of Meeting, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.

verses.kjv: And Moses was not able to enter into the tent of the congregation, because the cloud abode thereon, and the glory of the Lord filled the tabernacle.
verses.bsb: Moses was unable to enter the Tent of Meeting because the cloud had settled on it, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.

verses.kjv: And when the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, the children of Israel went onward in all their journeys:
verses.bsb: Whenever the cloud was lifted from above the tabernacle, the Israelites would set out through all the stages of their journey.

verses.kjv: But if the cloud were not taken up, then they journeyed not till the day that it was taken up.
verses.bsb: If the cloud was not lifted, they would not set out until the day it was taken up.

verses.kjv: For the cloud of the Lord was upon the tabernacle by day, and fire was on it by night, in the sight of all the house of Israel, throughout all their journeys.
verses.bsb: For the cloud of the LORD was over the tabernacle by day, and fire was in the cloud by night, in the sight of all the house of Israel through all their journeys.
